name: Cytokinesis
description: Detailed psychedelic cell division. A few large cells, rendered like confocal fluorescence microscopy, visibly divide in time with the music: each cell pinches through its cleavage furrow into a dumbbell and splits into two daughters — two radial green microtubule asters bursting from the spindle poles, a solid red cortical membrane, blue chromatin, and a magenta spindle midzone. Sustained energy paces each cell toward its split; a drum onset triggers the cytokinesis snap on the beat; the spectral centroid swings the fluorescence palette. The detailed-fidelity sibling of Mitosis. Explicit per-cell rendering, no new render primitive.
author: Matt
